Lucy

"The average person uses 10% of their brain capacity. Imagine what she could do with 100%."

6.5
2014MOVIERReleased

Synopsis

A woman, accidentally caught in a dark deal, turns the tables on her captors and transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

Tags

artificial intelligence (a.i.)telepathyintelligencedrug muletime traveltelekinesisfuturisticdrugssuper powertough girlsurgerybrain capacitysynthetic drughuman brainabsurd
